mnemonics: EVERY Layer Performs Crucial Functions: Ethereum (Application), Virtual Machine (Execution), Protocol (Consensus), Network (Peer-to-Peer), and Data (Storage)
keyPoints: The Ethereum stack consists of five layers: Application, Execution, Consensus, Network, and Data.
The Execution Layer is where the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) processes smart contracts and state transitions.
The Consensus Layer (beacon chain) is responsible for proof-of-stake block validation and achieving network agreement.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Execution Layer (EVM) with the Consensus Layer (proof-of-stake).
Assuming smart contracts are stored on the Consensus Layer instead of the Data/Storage Layer.
